title: puwach #6315
definition:
1) to breathe, blow
    1a) (Qal) to breathe
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to cause to exhale or breathe
        1b2) to puff, snort
        1b3) to excite, inflame
        1b4) to puff, pant for it
        1b5) to breathe out, utter
        1b6) to blow, blast
nasbUsage:
